name: indeed
description: Job search, job details, salary data, company profiles, reviews, and autocomplete via page extraction

dependencies.searchJobs \u2192 getJobDetail: searchJobs returns jobkey used by getJobDetail
dependencies.getCompanyOverview \u2192 getCompanyRevi: company slug used across company operations
dependencies.getCompanyOverview \u2192 getCompanySala: company slug used across company operations
dependencies.autocompleteJobTitle \u2192 getSalary: autocompleteJobTitle returns normalized titles for getSalary
dependencies.autocompleteLocation \u2192 searchJobs: autocompleteLocation returns location strings for searchJobs
